title: What I like most about Macbook Pro
content:
It's the plug. Or to be more exact, it's the "MagSafe Connector":http://www.apple.com/macbookpro/design.html ...

!https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tech/magsafe.jpg!

The rest is just a Powerbook with Intel chip. And obviously, the MagSafe (and the Macbook Pro attached to it) above doesn't "belong":http://www.dombovari.com/images/macbookpro/ to me.

p(me). Well, come to think of it, having 2 CPUs (Cores) inside a notebook is kinda cool too. Hmmm ...
